% Plain TeX basics — café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆
\catcode`\@=11
\def\greet#1{Hello, #1!}
\newcount\visits
\visits=42
\newdimen\measure
\measure=6.5pt
\ifnum\visits>10
  \message{many visits}
\else
  \message{few visits}
\fi
\iffalse
  ignored {material
    with {nested} groups}
  \ifodd\visits
    ignored conditional branch
  \fi
\fi
Inline math $a_1+b^2=\sqrt{9}$ and escaped \$ currency.
$$
  \sum_{n=1}^{3} n^2 = 14,\qquad
  \text{café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆}
$$
\def\pick{\@ifnextchar[\pickopt\pickplain}
\pick[optional] \\ % control word, brackets, newline, comment
\csname dynamically-built\endcsname
\catcode`\@=12
